app.name: Contentrain Studio
auth.magic_link_sent_description: We sent a login link to
auth.magic_link_sent_instruction: Check your inbox and click the link to sign in.
auth.marketing_signin_desc: Manage your content with conversation-first workflows.
auth.marketing_signup_desc: Set up your project and start managing content in seconds.
auth.or_email: or sign in with your email
auth.sign_in_description: Sign in to manage your content
error.403_description: You don't have permission to access this page.
error.404_description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
error.500_description: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.
projects.empty_description: Connect a GitHub repository to start managing content.
projects.title: Projects
settings.github_not_connected_hint: Install the GitHub App to connect repositories.
settings.members_description: Invite members and manage roles. Coming soon.
github.install_description: Studio needs access to your repositories to read and manage content.
github.install_hint: After installing, close this dialog and reopen it.
github.scan_failed: Failed to scan repository. Please try again.
github.contentrain_missing: .contentrain/ not found — you can initialize via chat after connecting
content.title: Content
content.not_found_description: Use the chat to set up your content structure. Just describe what content you want to manage.
content.no_models_description: Ask the agent in chat to create your first content model.
content.no_content_description: Ask the agent to create content for this model, or add entries via chat.
chat.empty_description: Ask the agent to create, edit, or manage your content.
chat.title: Chat
content.unsaved_changes: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?
content.slug_hint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
content.confirm_delete_model: Delete the {model} model and all its content?
chat.init_prompt: Initialize my project — detect the framework and set up content structure.
branch.confirm_reject: Reject this branch? All changes will be discarded.
members.no_members_description: Invite editors, reviewers, and viewers to collaborate on content.
members.project_access_description: Assign workspace members to projects with specific roles.
project_settings.title: Project Settings
project_settings.workflow_auto_desc: Changes are merged immediately after save.
project_settings.workflow_review_desc: Editors create branches. Reviewers approve before merge.
project_settings.workflow_info: Controls how content changes are applied. Auto-merge commits directly. Review creates branches for team approval.
project_settings.stack_info: The detected framework for this project. Used by the agent for framework-specific suggestions.
project_settings.default_locale_info: The primary language for content. New entries are created in this locale first.
project_settings.locales_info: All languages this project supports. Content can be translated into each locale.
project_settings.domains_info: Content domains organize models into logical groups (e.g. marketing, blog, system).
settings.workspace_name_info: Your workspace name appears in the sidebar and URLs.
settings.slug_info: URL-safe identifier used in workspace URLs. Changing this will update all workspace links.
settings.plan_info: Your current subscription tier. Determines available features and limits.
settings.github_info: GitHub App installation enables repository access for content management.
settings.members_info: Manage who can access this workspace and their permission levels.
ai_keys.title: API Keys
ai_keys.description: Use your own Anthropic API key for chat. Your key is encrypted and never stored in plaintext.
ai_keys.no_keys_description: Add your own API key to use advanced models.
cdn.title: CDN Delivery
cdn.description: Deliver content via CDN for mobile, desktop, and non-web apps.
cdn.keys_description: Keys authenticate CDN requests. Shown only once at creation.
cdn.key_created: API key created — copy it now, it won't be shown again
